chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-120 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.509/2024 3. For hearing of main case 06-03-2024 Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for the Petitioner M/s Naimat Ali Shah and Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for Respondent No.7 Mr. Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Naimat Ali Shah Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.7. Learned counsel for the petitioner files office order whereby impugned office order has been cancelled and withdrawn. He further submits that this petition has served its purpose and has become infructuous. Learned counsel for the petitioner therefore, does not press this petition and requests that petitioner may be directed to be dealt with in accordance with law. Accordingly this petition is dismissed as not pressed, however petitioner may be treated in accordance with law by the respondents. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
